title: Browser-history connector calls sql.Open("sqlite3", ...) but no SQLite driver is imported in the Go module

policySnapshot.rationale: User instructed: create the 6-artifact bug packet only; do NOT modify any source code. Fix work to be dispatched via bubbles.design → bubbles.plan → bubbles.implement → bubbles.test → bubbles.validate in a follow-up run.

completedPhaseClaims.summary: Created 6-artifact bug packet (spec.md, design.md, scopes.md, report.md, uservalidation.md, state.json) under specs/010-browser-history-connector/bugs/BUG-010-001-missing-sqlite-driver/. Pre-fix failure signature captured in report.md from static analysis (grep over go.mod/go.sum, read of internal/connector/browser/browser.go:111, ls of empty data/browser-history/History/, parent uservalidation evidence). No production code changed.

Added modernc.org/sqlite v1.38.2 (pure-Go, CGO-free, compatible with go 1.24.0) to go.mod. Created internal/connector/browser/sqlite_driver.go with a guarded init() calling sql.Register("sqlite3", &sqlite.Driver{}) so the unmodified production call site at internal/connector/browser/browser.go:111 resolves. Added tests/integration/browser_history_driver_test.go::TestSQLiteDriverRegistered (adversarial sentinel — no t.Skip, no bailout, blank-imports the browser package). Replaced the silent-skip path in tests/integration/browser_history_test.go::requireFixture with an on-demand deterministic seeder (seedDeterministicHistoryFixture) that builds a Chrome-shaped urls/visits SQLite database in t.TempDir() using the freshly registered "sqlite3" driver. Pre-fix RED captured for the sentinel and the 6 TestBrowserHistorySync_* tests; post-fix GREEN captured for all 7 tests both standalone and under ./smackerel.sh test integration. Build, lint, format, check, browser-package unit tests all pass. Validation phase (live-stack E2E + parent uservalidation re-cert) deferred to bubbles.validate; status remains in_progress.

Test execution covered by ./smackerel.sh test integration in this validate run. 7/7 PASS (TestSQLiteDriverRegistered + 6 TestBrowserHistorySync_*), 0 SKIP, 0 FAIL across the BUG-010-001 surface inside the live integration stack (postgres + NATS + smackerel-core + ml). All required test types (unit via earlier implement-phase run; integration via this validate run) are green for the BUG-010-001 surface. The dedicated tests/e2e/browser_history_e2e_test.go binary did not execute because the e2e disposable stack failed to start due to an unrelated 021_drive_schema.sql foreign-key migration regression owned by spec 038-cloud-drives-integration; the e2e file itself is ready to run.

Validated BUG-010-001 fix end-to-end against the live integration stack. ./smackerel.sh test integration: TestSQLiteDriverRegistered PASS + all 6 TestBrowserHistorySync_* PASS (7/7, 0 SKIP, 0 FAIL). Artifact lint PASSED for the bug folder. Bug spec.md and scopes.md status headers flipped to Fixed; state.json status + certification.status flipped to done. Parent feature uservalidation.md item 'Integration tests pass against real SQLite fixture' flipped from [ ]->[x] with full evidence. Item 'E2E tests pass against live stack' honestly retained as [ ] because the dedicated tests/e2e/browser_history_e2e_test.go binary cannot execute in this run — the e2e stack fails to start due to an unrelated migration 021_drive_schema.sql foreign-key error owned by spec 038-cloud-drives-integration. Blocker rotated, not fabricated. Parent state.json updated with resolvedBugs entry for BUG-010-001 and a clear note that the new e2e blocker is non-BUG-010-001.

Audit performed by bubbles.validate as part of bugfix-fastlane closure. Boundary audit: only the 5 paths in lockdownState.allowedPaths were modified (go.mod, go.sum, internal/connector/browser/sqlite_driver.go, tests/integration/browser_history_test.go, tests/integration/browser_history_driver_test.go). internal/connector/browser/browser.go is unchanged (git diff returns empty for that path). No other connector, agent, NATS, pipeline, API, or digest code was touched by this bug fix. Implementation reality scan: zero stub/fake/hardcoded/TODO patterns in sqlite_driver.go (22-line guarded init that calls sql.Register against the real modernc.org/sqlite driver). Adversarial regression audit: zero t.Skip calls in either driver test file or browser_history_test.go (the previous silent-skip path was replaced with t.Fatalf-on-failure deterministic seeder). Artifact lint PASS for the bug folder. State coherence: status=done, certification.status=done, scope status Done, all DoD items checked or honestly left unchecked with rotated-blocker notes (zero fabrication).

forbiddenPaths: internal/connector/browser/browser.go (semantic logic; only acceptable mutation is the single driver-name string if Q2 resolves to rename)
internal/nats/* (other than as required by E2E test setup, which is not in this bug's boundary)

executionHistory.summary: Bug packet filed in document-only mode. Created spec.md, design.md, scopes.md, report.md, uservalidation.md, state.json. Pre-fix failure signature recorded. No production code changes.

Implemented BUG-010-001 fix: added modernc.org/sqlite v1.38.2 + sqlite_driver.go alias registering "sqlite3", new adversarial sentinel test (RED captured pre-registration, GREEN post), deterministic on-demand Chrome history fixture seeder. All 7 BUG-010-001 tests PASS standalone and under live-stack ./smackerel.sh test integration. Build/lint/format/check green. Boundary clean (5 files: go.mod, go.sum, internal/connector/browser/sqlite_driver.go, tests/integration/browser_history_test.go, tests/integration/browser_history_driver_test.go). Pre-existing unrelated failures in internal/drive/google, internal/nats, ml/ documented as out-of-boundary. Validation (E2E + parent uservalidation re-cert) routed to bubbles.validate.

Validated end-to-end. ./smackerel.sh test integration: 7/7 PASS (TestSQLiteDriverRegistered + 6 TestBrowserHistorySync_*), 0 SKIP, 0 FAIL. Artifact lint PASS for bug folder. Bug spec.md/scopes.md/state.json all flipped to Fixed/done. Parent uservalidation item 1 flipped [ ]->[x] with full evidence. Item 2 honestly retained [ ] — e2e binary blocked by unrelated 021_drive_schema.sql FK migration error owned by spec 038. Blocker rotated, not fabricated. Parent state.json updated with resolvedBugs entry.

errorSignatures: integration: Chrome History test fixture not available
symptom.reproducedOn: main HEAD as of 2026-04-26 (static analysis: grep over go.mod/go.sum yields zero SQLite driver; read of internal/connector/browser/browser.go line 111 confirms the unregistered driver name; ls of data/browser-history/History/ confirms empty fixture dir)

impact: Blocks browser-history connector certification entirely. Both remaining unchecked items in specs/010-browser-history-connector/uservalidation.md fail because of this defect (integration vs SQLite fixture, E2E live-stack). Connector cannot read any real Chrome History file at runtime; sql.Open returns 'unknown driver "sqlite3"'.

deferred.parentUservalidationRecert: bubbles.validate (COMPLETE 2026-04-26 — item 1 flipped to [x]; item 2 retained [ ] with rotated, non-BUG-010-001 blocker noted)
